name: RhinoFileWatcherChangeReason
summary: Passed to IRhinoFileEventWatcher::Changed when a change event is raised.

enum_values.name: Created
enum_values.summary: The creation of a file or folder.

enum_values.name: Deleted
enum_values.summary: The deletion of a file or folder.

enum_values.name: Changed
enum_values.summary: The change of a file or folder. The types of changes include: changes to size, attributes, security settings, last write, and last access time.

enum_values.name: Renamed
enum_values.summary: The renaming of a file or folder.
